stories.title: Why Browns are giving Deshaun Watson another chanc...
stories.summary: The 30-year-old is competing with Shedeur Sanders to start in 2026. Here's what we know about his situation and future.

stories.title: JSN posts video over 'disrespectful' trophy gaffe
stories.summary: Jaxon Smith-Njigba, the NFL's reigning AP Offensive Player of the Year, posted a video to his Instagram account that showed how his trophy was mislabeled.

stories.title: NAACP calls for boycott of some college programs
stories.summary: The NAACP on Tuesday launched the "Out of Bounds" campaign to urge Black athletes and fans to boycott some public universities over voting restrictions.

stories.title: Wolverines star Johnson to remain in NBA draft
stories.summary: Michigan forward Morez Johnson Jr. is keeping his name in the NBA draft.

stories.title: Braves catalyst Baldwin to IL with oblique injury
stories.summary: Braves catcher Drake Baldwin, the reigning NL Rookie of the Year, was placed on the 10-day injured list with a strained right oblique muscle.
